summary: As of 5 May 2026, the AI bubble cauldron remains at 'Boiling' intensity with a heat score of 88. The Shiller CAPE ratio eased slightly to 39.19×—still 90% of the way to the 2000 dot-com peak of 43.5×—as the Q1 2026 earnings season closes. The S&P 500 forward P/E settled back to 20.9×. OpenAI and Anthropic simultaneously launched competing enterprise AI joint ventures backed by Wall Street (Blackstone/Goldman Sachs), signalling a shift from lab hype to institutionalised AI infrastructure. OpenAI released GPT-5.5 with advanced agentic capabilities. Hyperscaler capex commitment for 2026 remains ~$740B. FTC Operation AI Comply continues expanding into active consent orders and penalty enforcement. Enterprise AI failure rates persist at 80–85% with over 50% of GenAI projects abandoned after proof-of-concept (Gartner/MIT).

capeRatio.label: CAPE Ratio
capeRatio.description: Cyclically adjusted P/E for US market — 39.19× as of 5 May 2026, easing slightly from 41.1× but still 90% of the way to the dot-com all-time peak of 43.5×

sp500ForwardPE.label: S&P 500 Forward P/E
sp500ForwardPE.description: Forward price-to-earnings ratio for S&P 500 — 20.9× as of May 2026 (5-yr median 21.1×, 10-yr median 19.8×; source: FactSet)

top7StocksPE.label: Top 7 Stocks P/E
top7StocksPE.description: Average TTM P/E of 6 Magnificent 7 tech stocks (NVDA 37×, AMZN 32×, AAPL 32.5×, GOOGL 29×, META 25×, MSFT 25×; Tesla at 300×+ excluded as structural outlier — inclusion would distort index mean)

vcAiConcentration.label: VC → AI Share
vcAiConcentration.description: Share of global Q1 2026 VC investment flowing into AI ($242B of $297B) — record high

hyperscalerCapexBn.label: Hyperscaler Capex 2026
hyperscalerCapexBn.description: Revised 2026 data center / AI capex across major hyperscalers (Amazon $200B, Google $185B, Microsoft ~$165B, Meta ~$135B, Oracle $55B) — up ~80% YoY vs 2025's $410B aggregate; Microsoft and Meta raised guidance after Q1 2026 earnings

openAiRevenueBn.label: OpenAI Annual Revenue
openAiRevenueBn.description: Current annualised revenue run rate ($25B as of Feb 2026, doubled from $13B in 2025) vs $1.5T committed infrastructure spend through 2031

gridConnectionDelay.label: Grid Connection Delay
gridConnectionDelay.description: Average delay to connect a large-scale data center to the electricity grid (range 5–10 yrs); ~50% of 2026 US capacity at risk

dataCenterPowerDemandTWh.label: DC Power Demand
dataCenterPowerDemandTWh.description: Global data center electricity consumption — 2026 estimate revised sharply upward to ~945 TWh (from prior 600 TWh; source: industry analysts April 2026 citing AI racks at 30–100 kW each, exceeding IEA's earlier forecast); 2030 now projected ~1,200 TWh

aiUnicornsSince2024.label: AI Unicorns (Global)
aiUnicornsSince2024.description: AI-focused companies with $1B+ valuation globally as of early 2026 — ~50% of all new unicorn formation

narrativeSurgeNewbird.label: NewBird AI 1-Day Surge
narrativeSurgeNewbird.description: Allbirds (footwear) rebranded as NewBird AI and surged 582% intraday on zero AI revenue

topStories.headline: OpenAI and Anthropic simultaneously launch competing enterprise AI joint ventures backed by Wall Street (Blackstone/Goldman Sachs), raising billions to wire AI directly into institutional infrastructure

CAPE ratio climbs to 41.1× in May 2026 — within 2.4 points of the dot-com all-time peak of 43.5×

Nvidia deploys OpenAI Codex to all 10,000 employees; Jensen Huang declares 'age of AI' while Altman calls it 'awesome'
Big Tech Q1 2026 earnings confirm $700B hyperscaler capex for 2026 — largest annual tech capex in history

topStories.headline: OpenAI hits $25B annualised revenue — doubled from $13B in 2025; eyes $1T IPO valuation by late 2026
FTC Operation AI Comply escalates to active investigations and consent orders in April 2026; EU AI Act transparency rules take effect Aug 2026

81% of all global VC ($242B of $297B) flowed into AI sector in Q1 2026 — record concentration

AI coding assistants made programming 19% slower due to refactoring AI-generated code
